zh.St. Peters, Titchfield, Hampshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭哈普爾鐵費爾德聖 比特也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Hill於1570年出生在英國戴文艾可謝特時，她的父親William Hill30歲，母親Joan Annable30歲。她於1590年與Francis Littlefield在英國哈普爾鐵費爾德聖 比特也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1605年10月29日在英國哈普爾鐵費爾德享年35歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾鐵費爾德聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Hill于1570年出生在英国戴文艾可謝特时，她的父亲William Hill30岁，母亲Joan Annable30岁。她于1590年与Francis Littlefield在英国哈普爾鐵費爾德聖 比特也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1605年10月29日在英国哈普爾鐵費爾德享年35岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾鐵費爾德聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Hill was born in 1570, in Exeter, Devon, England, her father, William Hill, was 30 and her mother, Joan Annable, was 30. She married Francis Littlefield in 1590, in St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 29 October 1605, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, at the age of 35, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Hill est née en 1570, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, son père, William Hill, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan Annable, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Littlefield en 1590, à St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 29 octobre 1605, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterrée à St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Hill è nata il nel 1570 nel Exeter, Devon, England, sua padre, William Hill, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Joan Annable, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Francis Littlefield nel 1590, nel St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 29 ottobre 1605, nel Titchfield, Hampshire, England, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolta a St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Hillが1570年にイギリスデボンエクセターで生まれた時，父William Hillは30歳，母Joan Annableは30歳であった。1590年にイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドスト ペテル'ス チャーチでFrancis Littlefieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1605年10月29日にイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドで35歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドスト ペテル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire: 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.St. Peters, Titchfield, Hampshire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 티트ch필드 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Hill(이)가 1570년 영국 데폰 세터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Hill(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Annable(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1590년 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드 스트 피터'스 c후르치에서 Francis Littlefield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1605년 10월 29일 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Hill nasceu em 1570, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Hill, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan Annable, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Francis Littlefield em 1590, em St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1605, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos, e foi sepultada em St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Hill родилась в 1570 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени William Hill было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Annable, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Littlefield в 1590 г. в местности ст питир'с чурч, тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 29 октября 1605 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет и была похоронена в местности ст питир'с чурч, тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Hill nació en 1570, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, William Hill, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joan Annable, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Francis Littlefield en 1590, en St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 29 de octubre de 1605, en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultada en St Peter's Church, Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
